Container.Name: myanonamouse-mcp
Container.Overview: MCP server for MyAnonamouse. Runs in HTTP transport mode for remote MCP clients.
Container.Requires:
This requires a docker image named myanonamouse-mcp:latest.
You can build it from source using the Dockerfile found here: https://github.com/btc08gh/myanonamouse-mcp
docker build -t myanonamouse-mcp:latest .
You can test your container like so:
docker run -d \ --name myanonamouse-mcp \ -p 8080:8080 \ -e MAM_SESSION='<TOKEN GOES HERE>' \ -e MAM_API_TOKEN='<API TOKEN GOES HERE>' \ myanonamouse-mcp:latest

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port for the MCP endpoint at /mcp

Config.Name: MAM Session
Config.Description: Required. Your MyAnonamouse mam_id cookie from Preferences - Security.

Config.Name: MCP API Token
Config.Description: Recommended. A random secret you create to protect the MCP HTTP endpoint. You can generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32. Clients send Authorization: Bearer token.

Config.Name: OAuth Issuer
Config.Description: Optional OAuth issuer URL for HTTP transport. Most users should leave this blank.
